data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the confirmation message for appointments, specifically the SMS content. However, the evidence does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the implementation of the SMS confirmation message as specified. The linked use case scenario mentions the confirmation message, but without direct evidence of its functionality, this indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the SMS confirmation message as specified.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the SMS confirmation message.
